'''鈭歽-zh-h''' ('''yazhaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whippe|whippe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-zh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whippe|whippe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-zh-h
|-
! Lemma
| yazhaha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yazhahithi|yazhahithi]] || [[word:yazhahiji|yazhahiji]] || [[word:yazhahishi|yazhahishi]] || [[word:yazhahi|yazhahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yazhahuthuth|yazhahuthuth]] || [[word:yazhahujuj|yazhahujuj]] || [[word:yazhahushush|yazhahushush]] || [[word:yazhah|yazhah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yazhahuthu|yazhahuthu]] || [[word:yazhahuju|yazhahuju]] || [[word:yazhahushu|yazhahushu]] || [[word:yazhahu|yazhahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yazhahufuth|yazhahufuth]] || [[word:yazhahufuj|yazhahufuj]] || [[word:yazhahufush|yazhahufush]] || [[word:yazhahuf|yazhahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yazhahethe|yazhahethe]] || [[word:yazhaheje|yazhaheje]] || [[word:yazhaheshe|yazhaheshe]] || [[word:yazhahe|yazhahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yazhahothoth|yazhahothoth]] || [[word:yazhahojoj|yazhahojoj]] || [[word:yazhahoshosh|yazhahoshosh]] || [[word:yazhah|yazhah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yazhahotho|yazhahotho]] || [[word:yazhahojo|yazhahojo]] || [[word:yazhahosho|yazhahosho]] || [[word:yazhaho|yazhaho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yazhahofoth|yazhahofoth]] || [[word:yazhahofoj|yazhahofoj]] || [[word:yazhahofosh|yazhahofosh]] || [[word:yazhahof|yazhahof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yazhah忙th忙|yazhah忙th忙]] || [[word:yazhah忙j忙|yazhah忙j忙]] || [[word:yazhah忙sh忙|yazhah忙sh忙]] || [[word:yazhah忙|yazhah忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yazhahathath|yazhahathath]] || [[word:yazhahajaj|yazhahajaj]] || [[word:yazhahashash|yazhahashash]] || [[word:yazhah|yazhah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yazhahatha|yazhahatha]] || [[word:yazhahaja|yazhahaja]] || [[word:yazhahasha|yazhahasha]] || [[word:yazhaha|yazhaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yazhahafath|yazhahafath]] || [[word:yazhahafaj|yazhahafaj]] || [[word:yazhahafash|yazhahafash]] || [[word:yazhahaf|yazhahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yazhahasha|yazhahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyazhahasha|goyazhahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyazhahasha|gokiyazhahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yazhahn眉sha|yazhahn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyazhahnkn眉sha|goyazhahnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyazhahn眉sha|gokiyazhahn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yazhahsh毛sha|yazhahsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyazhahnksh毛sha|goyazhahnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyazhahsh毛sha|gokiyazhahsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yazhahrosha|yazhahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyazhahnkrosha|goyazhahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyazhahrosha|gokiyazhahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yazhahmusha|yazhahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyazhahnkmusha|goyazhahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyazhahmusha|gokiyazhahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yazhahsherasha|yazhahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyazhahnksherasha|goyazhahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyazhahsherasha|gokiyazhahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yazhahngasha|yazhahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyazhahnkngasha|goyazhahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyazhahngasha|gokiyazhahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yazhahyasha|yazhahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyazhahnkyasha|goyazhahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyazhahyasha|gokiyazhahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yazhahyamasha|yazhahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyazhahnkyamasha|goyazhahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyazhahyamasha|gokiyazhahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yazhahn眉sh毛sha|yazhahn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyazhahnkn眉sh毛sha|goyazhahnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyazhahn眉sh毛sha|gokiyazhahn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yazhahn眉rosha|yazhahn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyazhahnkn眉rosha|goyazhahnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyazhahn眉rosha|gokiyazhahn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yazhahn眉musha|yazhahn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyazhahnkn眉musha|goyazhahnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyazhahn眉musha|gokiyazhahn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yazhahsh毛n眉sha|yazhahsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyazhahnksh毛n眉sha|goyazhahnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyazhahsh毛n眉sha|gokiyazhahsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yazhahsh毛rosha|yazhahsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyazhahnksh毛rosha|goyazhahnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyazhahsh毛rosha|gokiyazhahsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yazhahsh毛musha|yazhahsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyazhahnksh毛musha|goyazhahnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyazhahsh毛musha|gokiyazhahsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yazhahron眉sha|yazhahron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyazhahnkron眉sha|goyazhahnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyazhahron眉sha|gokiyazhahron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yazhahrosh毛sha|yazhahrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyazhahnkrosh毛sha|goyazhahnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyazhahrosh毛sha|gokiyazhahrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yazhahromusha|yazhahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyazhahnkromusha|goyazhahnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyazhahromusha|gokiyazhahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yazhahmun眉sha|yazhahmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyazhahnkmun眉sha|goyazhahnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyazhahmun眉sha|gokiyazhahmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yazhahmush毛sha|yazhahmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyazhahnkmush毛sha|goyazhahnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyazhahmush毛sha|gokiyazhahmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yazhahmurosha|yazhahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyazhahnkmurosha|goyazhahnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyazhahmurosha|gokiyazhahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yazhah|yazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:y忙zh忙h|y忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyazhah|hoyazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoy忙zh忙h|hoy忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyazhah|hohoyazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoy忙zh忙h|hohoy忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉yazhah|n眉yazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉y忙zh忙h|n眉y忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉yazhah|n眉n眉yazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉y忙zh忙h|n眉n眉y忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂yazhah|n茂yazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂y忙zh忙h|n茂y忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂yazhah|n茂n茂yazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂y忙zh忙h|n茂n茂y忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyazhah|luyazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luy忙zh忙h|luy忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyazhah|luluyazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluy忙zh忙h|luluy忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyazhah|liyazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liy忙zh忙h|liy忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyazhah|liliyazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliy忙zh忙h|liliy忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyazhah|koyazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koy忙zh忙h|koy忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyazhah|kokoyazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoy忙zh忙h|kokoy忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyazhah|keyazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:key忙zh忙h|key忙zh忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyazhah|kekeyazhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekey忙zh忙h|kekey忙zh忙h]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
